MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556
  • Home
  • Development Library
  • Examples
  • Release Notes
CaptureByInput C++

CaptureByInput illuminates how to capture videos with Magewell capture card when receiving registered event notification.
Compared with CaptureByTimer C++, the frame rate captured in this example is the same as that of the input source. An event notification will be send to notify the capture software to get this frame, after a video frame is buffered to the on-board memory of the capture card. The scheme makes the example work more stable.
Folder dir: SDKv3\Examples\Legacy_Legacy_VC++\CmdTools\CaptureByInput

Supported Hardware

Pro Capture Family

Features

  1. Capture the video data in the format of the input signal.
  2. Save the last frame as a .bmp file.
  3. Specify capture channel by command parameter when multiple device are loaded in your system.

Flow Chart

CaptureByInput

Workflow

  1. To get device version, initialize and enumerate all available devices, call: MWGetVersion, MWCaptureInitInstance, MWGetChannelCount
  2. To find a valid capture card by its device info,, call: MWGetChannelInfoByIndex;

  3. Conduct any of the following steps to open a channel:

    1. To open the specified channel by the command parameter, call: MWOpenChannel;
    2. To open the first available channel by default when not being specified, call: MWGetDevicePath, MWOpenChannelByPath;
  4. To get the video signal status, call: MWGetVideoSignalStatus;
  5. To start video capture, call: MWStartVideoCapture;
  6. To register for notifications, call: MWRegisterNotify:To progressively scan for notifications, call: MWCAP_NOTIFY_VIDEO_FRAME_BUFFERED;
  7. To get the video frame triggered by specified notifications, call: MWGetNotifyStatus, MWCaptureVideoFrameToVirtualAddressEx;
  8. To get current capture status, and clear up capture card memory, call: MWGetVideoCaptureStatus;
  9. Repeat step 7 and 8.
  10. Save the last frame as a BMP file.
  11. To stop recording, and free up system resources and memory, call: MWUnregisterNotify, MWStopVideoCapture, MWCloseChannel, MWCaptureExitInstance

Result

CaptureByInput
